Pauline Christianity is a [[hydroplane]]. [[Patient Zero]] was  [[Saint Paul]].  It is a [[self disconnector]] and induces [[angst]] by creating a perception of a clash between love and justice.<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5qK99VUDh-o</ref> 

== See Also ==

* [[Neo-Calvinism]]

== References ==
[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Pauline Christianity]][[sn:Pauline Christianity]][[Category:Self-disconnectors]]
[[Category:Christianity]]
[[Category:Pages]]
